menuItems.name: Tom Yum Goong
menuItems.description: A classic spicy and sour Thai soup cooked with fresh prawns, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, galangal, and red chilies.

menuItems.name: Wild Mushroom Tom Kha
menuItems.description: Silky and aromatic coconut milk soup infused with fresh lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime, and exotic wild mushrooms.

menuItems.name: Wasabi Rock Prawns
menuItems.description: Crispy tempura fried rock prawns tossed in a velvety, sweet and spicy wasabi mayonnaise, topped with black sesame.

menuItems.name: Crispy Chili Babycorn & Lotus Root
menuItems.description: Crunchy baby corn and sliced lotus root tossed with diced bell peppers, spring onions, and premium dark chili sauce.

menuItems.name: Truffle Edamame & Cheese Dumpling
menuItems.description: Exquisite dumplings filled with crushed edamame, cream cheese, and a delicate drizzle of black truffle oil.

menuItems.name: Classic Steamed Crystal Chicken Momo
menuItems.description: Translucent skin dumplings stuffed with finely minced chicken, ginger, scallions, served with our signature firecracker chili sauce.
menuItems.photoMessage: Real photos required from restaurant. Admin must upload actual photos.

menuItems.name: Hokai Signature Dragon Roll
menuItems.description: Uramaki sushi with crispy prawn tempura and cucumber inside, draped with layers of ripe avocado, unagi eel sauce, and spicy mayo.
menuItems.photoMessage: Real photos required from restaurant. Admin must upload actual photos.

menuItems.name: Avocado Cucumber Cream Cheese Roll
menuItems.description: Delicate sushi roll filled with Hass avocado slices, crisp English cucumber, and rich cream cheese, toasted with toasted sesame.

menuItems.name: Traditional Shrimp Pad Thai
menuItems.description: Flat rice noodles stir-fried in a tangy tamarind sauce with fresh prawns, firm tofu, egg, bean sprouts, and crushed roasted peanuts.

menuItems.name: Hakka Chili Garlic Noodles (Veg)
menuItems.description: Classic wok-tossed noodles with colorful julienne vegetables, minced garlic, dry red chilies, and a dash of dark soy sauce.

menuItems.name: Butterfly Pea Jasmine Rice
menuItems.description: Premium Thai Jasmine rice naturally dyed with blue butterfly pea flowers, steamed with lemongrass and lime leaves.

menuItems.name: Spicy Thai Basil Fried Rice (Chicken)
menuItems.description: Fragrant jasmine rice wok-fried with minced chicken, fresh holy basil, bird's eye chilies, onions, garlic, and a sunny-side-up egg.

menuItems.name: Royal Thai Green Curry (Veg)
menuItems.description: An aromatic herb-rich curry of green chilies, lemongrass, and sweet basil cooked in rich coconut milk with exotic Asian vegetables.

menuItems.name: Kung Pao Chicken
menuItems.description: Sautéed diced chicken breast with roasted cashew nuts, bell peppers, dried red chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns in a savory sweet-tangy glaze.

menuItems.name: Mango Sticky Rice
menuItems.description: Sweet Thai sticky rice cooked in coconut cream, served with slices of fresh sweet mango and sprinkled with toasted mung beans.

menuItems.name: Matcha Chocolate Lava Cake
menuItems.description: Warm molten dark chocolate cake with a premium Uji matcha white chocolate liquid core, served with a scoop of vanilla bean gelato.

menuItems.name: Hokai Lemongrass Ginger Cooler
menuItems.description: Our signature mocktail. Cold-muddled lemongrass, fresh ginger root extract, kaffir lime syrup, club soda, and ice.
menuItems.photoMessage: Real photos required from restaurant. Admin must upload actual photos.

menuItems.name: Lychee Jasmine Iced Tea
menuItems.description: Chilled artisanal loose-leaf jasmine green tea, sweetened with sweet lychee nectar and garnished with fresh mint sprigs.

websiteContent.aboutSection: HOKAI Pan-Asian Kitchen brings you an exquisite selection of culinary wonders from the vibrant heart of Asia. Nestled in a premium, ultra-modern luxury environment, our chefs synthesize fresh, local premium ingredients with traditional culinary methods. From masterfully crafted sushi and delicate steamed momos to high-fired wok specialties and royal Thai curries, HOKAI invites you on an unforgettable journey of gastronomic luxury.

contactInfo.address: 218/1, Plot no 106, Defence Colony, Sainikpuri, Secunderabad, Telangana 500094
